results.term: Extremely hard.  I remember that morning like it w...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Extremely hard.  I remember that morning like it was yesterday.  He got killed within an hour after leaving the house on his way to work.

results.term: Very soon.  And the worst thing is I was upset wit...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Very soon.  And the worst thing is I was upset with him that morning.  He had an addiction to xanax.  I was not ok with it.  He had went and got some that morning and he would always give them to me so I could give them to him so he didn't take them all.  I was so upset that he went and got them.  He was packing up his truck with things to take to the new shop that day.  He was a tattoo artist and just started a new job.  I didn't even get out of bed to help him and he knew I was upset with him.

results.term: I had decided that I was gonna wait to hear from h...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I had decided that I was gonna wait to hear from him that day instead of texting or calling him.  I wanted him to realize how upset his addiction made me. Instead the phone call I got was that he had been killed.

results.term: I haven't done any counseling.  I know I should an...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I haven't done any counseling.  I know I should and it would probably help me.  I don't know why I have not.

results.term: I don't feel guilt about it.  Now at least.  I was...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I don't feel guilt about it.  Now at least.  I was pretty hard on myself at first.  But I know that he knows why I was upset that morning.  It was something we dealt with a lot.

results.term: I went and talked to a therapist once right after ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I went and talked to a therapist once right after and never went back.  And I don't know why.  He was amazing to talk too.  But I just never went back.

results.term: I don't have any contact with his family.  I actua...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I don't have any contact with his family.  I actually had to block them on all social media.  They are extremely religous.  Which there is nothing wrong with that.  But he didn't have the best relationship with any of them.  They couldn't accept him for who he was.  His biological father didn't have anything to do with him.  His mom was remarried and had two more kids and they didn't treat my boyfriend very good growing up.  He ended up living with his grandparents.  He finally had acceptance in my family.  He actually talked to my mom more than I did lol.

results.term: His family has been pretty horrible to me and my g...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: His family has been pretty horrible to me and my girls.  And I know it's because they have guilt for the way things were with their relationship.  They didn't even invite me and my girls to the burial of his ashes.

results.term: It's very sad.  Not what I wanted at all.  But the...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: It's very sad.  Not what I wanted at all.  But they were really horrible to me and my girls.  I know he would not be happy that they have treated us so poorly.

results.term: His sisters went and cleaned out and took everythi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: His sisters went and cleaned out and took everything he had from the shop the day after the funeral.  Which really hurt.  The stuff he had there meant alot to me.

results.term: I hope I can too.  I just take everything day by d...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I hope I can too.  I just take everything day by day.  I start a new job this week and hopefully things will start looking up.  The last 3 years have been rough to say the least.

results.term: We weren't married. And of course he didn't have a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: We weren't married. And of course he didn't have a will.  He was only 32.  So according to his family I have no legal rights.

results.term: Thank you for chatting with me.
